user.title: Connect to Hubitat
user.description: Enter your Hubitat Elevation hub details. The Maker API app must be set to expose **All Devices**.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Hubitat Bridge
reconfigure.description: Update your Hubitat Elevation hub details.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the hub at this URL.
error.invalid_token: Access token rejected by the hub. Check the Maker API token.
error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Check your username and password.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See logs for details.

init.title: Hubitat Bridge Options
init.description: Optionally provide a URL to a custom icon image (PNG or JPG, 256×256 recommended). Leave blank to use the default icon. **Restart Home Assistant after saving to apply the new icon.**

error.icon_download_failed: Could not download the image from that URL. Check the URL and that it points to a valid image file.
